# CozyPixels - Serene 4K Aesthetic Wallpapers

CozyPixels is a completely free, open-source library containing over 900+ curated 4K wallpapers. It provides a highly curated collection of aesthetic wallpapers organized by color palettes such as Catppuccin, Nord, and One Dark. 

## Platforms
- **Web App**: https://cozy-pixels.vercel.app
- **Desktop App**: A lightweight, blazing-fast native application for Windows and macOS that auto-rotates wallpapers.
- **Chrome Extension**: Transforms your new tab page into a cozy, aesthetic workspace.

## Key Features
- High-resolution, 4K static aesthetic wallpapers
- Zero telemetry, completely open source
- No battery drain (unlike animated wallpapers)
- Highly curated for developer and aesthetic communities

## Official Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/yadavnikhil03/CozyPixels
- Download Desktop App: https://github.com/yadavnikhil03/CozyPixels/releases
- Chrome Extension: https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28417336/Cozypixels_extension.zip
